title: Zigh's Wack Pack
description:
Minecraft but memes
(Absolutely NOT for quality of life)
body:
Minecraft vanilla but it has brainrot and memes

Changes stuff like:
- several ores & their blocks
- paintings (3 so far)
- some blocks
- UI

long explanation bc the legal eagles said so:

This Minecraft™️ Resource Pack was made for the purpose of humor and does so by replacing some of the textures to have memes, change them to be ironic, or a play on words.
